creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
Sorry I've missed the other emails it seems, but I just double check and it works fine in the latest version

miguelc at r2d2 in ~
○ sudo pkg info |eg 'aws|ndg'; aws --version
awscli-1.9.17                  Universal Command Line Interface for Amazon Web Services
py27-ndg_httpsclient-0.4.0_2   Enhance HTTPS support for httplib and urllib2
aws-cli/1.9.17 Python/2.7.11 FreeBSD/11.0-CURRENT botocore/1.3.17


I also tried a few api calls ec2 describe-instances and such and all works fine with ndg_httpsclient installed.

So I guess we can probably change the reason of close to FIXED?
